name: Warm holder / cambro
description: Set to ~65.5 °C (150 °F). Wrapped brisket slowly cools into the hold.

name: Kitchen counter
description: Loose foil or uncovered — cools toward room temp. Good for short rest if pulled hot.

name: Fridge
description: Chills fast — collagen rendering nearly stops. Slice later.

name: Custom ambient
description: Set your own target temp (oven on low, cool box, etc.).
